case_title: BOARD OF REGENTS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA vs. LOVALLO, DAN PHILLIP

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOARD OF REGENTS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA F/U/B UNIVERSITY OF FLORIDA AS TO DEFENDANT LOVALLO, DAN PHILLIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOARD OF REGENTS OF THE STATE OF FLORIDA F/U/B UNIVERSITY OF FLORIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOVALLO, DAN PHILLIP $5,948.71 PRINCIPAL, $728.93 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,757.64 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
